name: Ernie Kovacs
abstract: Ernest Edward Kovacs (January 23, 1919 – January 13, 1962) was an American comedian, actor, and writer. Kovacs's visually experimental and often spontaneous comedic style influenced numerous television comedy programs for years after his death.

concerts.label: Children's Asthma Research Institute and Hospital 3rd Annual Parade of Stars

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Rosengarden
about_quotes.evidence: Ernie and I became good friends and he always called me “Rosie.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Rosengarden interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 6, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: I did – for instance, on radio, I did the Ernie Kovacs radio show.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
